title: DEMOGRAPHIC DISTORTIONS
subtitle: State Lies and the Manipulation of Population Figures in Africa
abstract:
(...) Former ambassador to the United States and former permanent representative to the UN Security Council, he is the author of the book « We Were Alone ». Gérard Araud likewise claims that the African population « doubles every 30 years ».

He uses the term « demographic explosion » and presents the following figures:
⟶ 4 million Nigerians in 1960
⟶ 25 million Nigerians today
⟶ 50 million in 30 years.

The website The True Size, mentioned above, allows users to drag and drop a country onto any continent to better understand its scale.

title: WEALTH AND INVISIBLE POWERS
subtitle: Invisible Dynamics and Obstacles in Collective Projects
abstract: (...) In March 2010, in the wake of the election of Barack Obama, in the United States of America—referred to as the « Disunited States of America » by Dr. S. Mumbi—a major symposium was organized in Chicago, on the campus of Chicago State University, at the initiative of journalist and intellectual Tavis Smiley. This event aimed to launch the collective work 'The Covenant with Black America' and to open a critical debate on the perceived absence of a « Black agenda » in the policies of the new administration.
